calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Claudia Fabiani, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Veronica Sophia Marquez, was sworn and examined.
Objections to the proposed change of name were made by Declaration of Robert Marquez, filed April 20, 2005.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Veronica Sofia Fabiani-Marquez.
Decree signed in open court.
